name: TRG_locus_chr7p14
description: T-cell receptor gamma (TRG) locus on chromosome 7p14. ~160 kb spanning ~14 V-gamma gene segments (6-7 functional) and 5 J-gamma segments with 2 constant regions (Cg1, Cg2). Compact relative to TRA/TRB/IGH but still V(D)J-recombined per T-cell clone.

architecture.internal_structure: V-gamma cluster (~14 Vs) -> Jg1.1-Jg1.2-Cg1 -> Jg2.1-Jg2.3-Cg2. V(D)J recombination per clone.

related_diseases: T-cell clonality assays use TRG PCR
